name: Kalamata Olive Herb Butter
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Kalamata olives, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the butter, mustard, and garlic until thoroughly mixed and smooth.
2. Gradually add the remaining ingredients and blend to the desired texture.
If you can't find Kalamata olives, any strongly flavored black olive will do. The finished product is a piquant, delicious butter.
